title: Swan Townhouse 18cm 3 Tier Stainless Steel Steamer with Glass Lid, Suitable for All Hob Types (including induction), Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel
features: HEALTHIER, NUTRITIOUS COOKING: Not just a vegetable steamer, this Swan Townhouse 3 tier stainless steel steamer includes one base pot, and 2 inserts for steaming a wide range of ingredients, including fish, rice, pasta and more at the same time. It locks in the flavour and retains nutrients for healthier cooking.

PERFECT FOR EVERY DAY COOKING: This food steamer is made from high quality stainless steel, which provides even heat distribution for the best cooking results. It’s also scratch and dent resistant, giving the steamer long-lasting durability. Perfect for every day home cooking.

EFFICIENT COOKING: Our stainless steel steamer includes a tempered glass lid with steam release vents, which improves the cooking process by allowing steam to escape while maintaining all nutrients. The fast/slow straining rim gives you control on how much water to drain.
CARE INSTRUCTIONS: This food steamer is dishwasher safe, making it very easy to clean after a big cooking session. However, we do recommend you hand wash to help maintain the quality finish.
5 YEAR GUARANTEE: This 3 tier stainless steel steamer comes with a 1 year manufacturer’s guarantee with an additional 4 years when you register the product.
description: From the manufacturer With a strong British heritage dating back to the 1920s, Swan understand that the kitchen is the hub of activity and an integral part of home life. Designed at our UK headquarters Iconic cookware and appliances at affordable prices Designed to bring expression, style and functionality to the heart of the home Swan SWPS5026SS Townhouse 18cm 3 Tier Stainless Steel Steamer with Glass Lid, Suitable for All Hob Types (including induction), Dishwasher Safe, Stainless Steel Affordable, high-quality cookware for the everyday home cook This Swan Townhouse 3 tier steamer is an essential part of your cooking tool kit. Not just a vegetable steamer, steam a range of ingredients, including fish, rice, pasta and more at one time. This food steamer is suitable for use on all hob types, including induction, and oven safe for added versatility. Oven safe up to 150°C for up to 40 mins. Dishwasher safe. The Swan Townhouse collection combines striking modern design with beautiful detailing in sleek finishes with coordinated colours. Includes one base pot and 2 steamer inserts Create healthy steamed dishes with ease High grade polished stainless steel body Tempered glass lid and inner capacity marking Suitable for all hob types, including induction Oven safe up to 150°C for up to 40 mins Dishwasher safe Colour: Stainless Steel VERSATILE COOKING OPTIONS This is the best stainless steel steamer for all your cooking needs as it’s suitable for all hob types, including induction. It’s even oven safe up to 150°C for up to 40 mins, so you can finish off your meal after cooking on the hob. It’s the perfect versatile cooking companion. SERVE & POUR WITH EASE The Swan Townhouse 3 tier steamer is specially designed with riveted staycool handles and lid knob. They’re heat-resistant, while providing a comfortable grip, making cooking much safer. The base pot features double pouring spouts, making it suitable for left or right handed users. Easily drain then serve your food straight to the table. TOWNHOUSE COLLECTION Complimenting both traditional and modern kitchens, our Townhouse range features striking modern design with beautiful detailing in sleek finishes with coordinated colours.
